title: PacBio HiFi Variant Pipeline — Parameter Schema
description: Nextflow parameter schema for the PacBio HiFi variant calling pipeline.

input_output_options.title: Input / Output
input_output_options.description: Input files and output directory. Provide either --samplesheet (multi-sample) or --reads + --sample (single sample).

samplesheet.description: Path to samplesheet CSV for multi-sample runs.
samplesheet.help_text: CSV file with format: sample_name,/path/to/reads.fastq. No header required. Example: samplesheet.csv

reads.description: Path to input HiFi FASTQ file (single sample mode).
reads.help_text: PacBio HiFi (CCS) reads in FASTQ or FASTQ.GZ format. Use --samplesheet for multiple samples. Example: test_data/synthetic_reads.fastq

reference.help_text: Reference genome FASTA. A .fai index will be created automatically if not present. Example: reference/chr20.fa

sample.description: Sample name for single-sample mode output file naming.
sample.help_text: Required when using --reads. Used as the prefix for all output files. Avoid spaces and slashes. Example: sample_001

outdir.help_text: All pipeline outputs are written here. Created automatically if it does not exist.

aligner.description: Aligner to use for read mapping.
aligner.help_text: minimap2 runs locally via conda or Docker. pbmm2 requires -profile docker.

snv_caller.help_text: bcftools runs locally via conda or Docker. clair3 and deepvariant require -profile docker.

threads.description: Number of threads for alignment and variant calling.

clair3_options.title: Clair3 Options
clair3_options.description: Options specific to the Clair3 variant caller.

clair3_model.description: Path to Clair3 pre-trained model directory.
clair3_model.help_text: Required when --snv_caller clair3. Container-internal paths (e.g. /opt/models/hifi) are accepted.
